hero.title: For a Life Full of Love,
hero.subtitle: Professional counseling and guidance for individuals, couples, and families — rooted in evidence, delivered with warmth.

services.subtitle: Specialized, Evidence-Based Support for Every Stage of Life
services.pageTitle: Support That Meets You Where You Are
services.pageSubtitle: Specialized support for families, couples, youth, and adults — rooted in evidence, delivered with warmth.
services.startHereDesc: Not sure where to begin? Let's have a conversation — your first one is on us.
services.priceDisclaimer: Pricing reflects the depth and duration of support. Final rates are personalized during your consultation.

about.description: We are a family-focused consulting and counseling organization dedicated to strengthening lives and relationships.
about.story: With over a decade of experience in family counseling and child development, Dr. Hala Ali — known lovingly as Mama Hala — has dedicated her career to empowering families, couples, and individuals. From her roots in the Middle East to establishing her practice across Dubai and Canada, she brings a unique blend of cultural understanding and evidence-based expertise.
about.missionText: To empower families and individuals with the emotional tools, knowledge, and support they need to build stronger, healthier relationships and face life's challenges with confidence.
about.visionText: All youth and families are emotionally healthy, empowered with the tools and knowledge to face life's challenges.
about.approachText: We use evidence-based therapeutic methods combined with a warm, culturally sensitive approach to support our diverse community.

reasons.title: Culturally Sensitive
reasons.desc: Understanding and respecting the unique cultural dynamics of Arab and multicultural families.

reasons.title: Evidence-Based
reasons.desc: Using proven therapeutic methods including CBT, executive function coaching, and family systems therapy.

reasons.title: Bilingual Support
reasons.desc: Full service delivery in both English and Arabic for comfortable and effective communication.

reasons.title: Holistic Approach
reasons.desc: Addressing the whole person — mind, emotions, relationships, and daily functioning.

steps.title: We Listen
steps.description: We start with a real conversation to understand your needs, challenges, and what support would feel most helpful right now.

steps.title: We Design
steps.description: Together, we define clear goals and create a support plan tailored to your life — not a template.

steps.title: We Support
steps.description: Support is delivered with care, clarity, and ethical boundaries, in a space that feels safe, respectful, and collaborative.

steps.title: We Grow
steps.description: We review progress, adapt when needed, and focus on sustainable growth that continues beyond the sessions.

booking.subtitle: Pick a path below and we'll take it from there.
booking.whereToStart: Where would you like to start?
booking.newClientDesc: Your first conversation is free — 30 minutes, no pressure, no commitment. Just a safe space to explore what support looks like for you.
booking.returningClientDesc: Ready for your next session? Pick your service and request a time that works for you.
booking.notSure: Not sure which service is right for you?
booking.step1: Choose a time that works for you
booking.step2: We review your request and confirm
booking.step3: You receive an invoice via email
booking.confirmWithin24h: Select a time and we'll confirm within 24 hours

contact.pageTitle: We'd Love to Hear From You
contact.subtitle: Whatever is on your mind — a question, a concern, or just a hello — we're here.
contact.sentDesc: Thank you for reaching out. We'll get back to you within 24 hours.

resources.subtitle: Articles, programs, and practical tools to support you between sessions.
resources.blogDesc: Stories, insights, and practical wisdom on parenting, relationships, and emotional growth.
resources.faqsDesc: Quick answers to the questions we hear most about our services and approach.
resources.eventsDesc: Live workshops, webinars, and community gatherings — learn and connect.
resources.programsDesc: Guided courses designed for deeper learning and lasting transformation.
resources.downloadsDesc: Worksheets, guides, and practical tools you can start using today.

newsletter.title: Stay Connected
newsletter.subtitle: Get practical tips, free resources, and updates on new programs.
newsletter.leadMagnet: Subscribe and receive our free guide: "5 Ways to Support Your Child's Emotional Growth"
newsletter.privacy: We respect your privacy. Unsubscribe at any time.

cta.readyDesc: Your first conversation is free — a safe, private space to share what's on your mind and explore how we can help.

footer.description: A consulting organization using the power of human science and interaction to enable better quality of life and relationships.
